# Storage adapter interface

Bridge doc — canonical schema + CLI contract for `epic-driven-roadmap` storage
adapters. Single source of truth: `local-markdown/schema.py`. The consumer
table block below is auto-generated by `gen_interface_doc.py`; manual edits
fail AC-2c at PR time.

## Canonical field consumers (auto-generated — do not edit manually)

<!-- BEGIN-GENERATED-CONSUMER-TABLE -->
| Field | Consumer |
|---|---|
| `schema_version` | adapter version negotiation (AC-7/7b) |
| `slug` | adapter identity |
| `status` | Stage 7 ship gate; audit status-drift (carve-out) |
| `started` | Stage 7 ship gate (range boundary); required if status != 'proposed' |
| `landed` | Stage 7 ship gate; required if status == 'done' |
| `aim` | Foundation elicitation gate (AC-10 reuse check) |
| `intention` | Foundation elicitation gate |
| `out_of_scope` | Foundation elicitation gate |
| `phases` | close procedure; ROADMAP rollup (carve-out) |
| `retrospective` | close procedure (append on close) |
| `open_questions` | Foundation gate (sentinel injection); audit (carve-out) |
| `phases[].n` | close procedure (phase enumeration) |
| `phases[].title` | close procedure (phase enumeration) |
| `phases[].status` | close procedure (all phases done?) |
| `phases[].landed` | Stage 7 ship gate (per-phase landed date) |
<!-- END-GENERATED-CONSUMER-TABLE -->

## Sidecar passthrough

Fields without a Phase-2 consumer gate that round-trip opaquely:

- `sidecar` (epic-level) — backend decoration (e.g. `retro_scanned`, `pivots`,
  `retrospective_body_markdown`)
- `phases[].sidecar` — per-phase backend decoration (e.g. `spec` / `plan`
  links read by the carved-out audit procedure)

## CLI contract

```
Usage:
  cli.py read    --slug <slug>
  cli.py write   --slug <slug> --stdin
  cli.py list
  cli.py exists  --slug <slug>

Exit codes:
  0 success         5 CanonicalSerialisationError
  1 not found       6 SidecarUnstorableError
  2 EpicNotFound    7 StructuralHostMissingError
  3 SchemaValid'n   8 AdapterNotFoundError (Step-0 selector layer)
  4 SchemaVerMis    9 unspecified internal
```

Stderr carries `<ErrorClassName>: <message>` on every non-zero exit.
Stdout is clean JSON on success.

## Supported frontmatter subset (local-markdown backend)

Schema is first-party. The on-disk format is a hand-rolled YAML subset; the
parser IS the spec. Anything outside this subset raises `SchemaValidationError`
loud — no silent accept.

- **Scalar**: `key: value` where value is str, int, `null` / `~` / empty (→ None).
- **String quoting**: bare, single-quoted, or double-quoted. Inline comments
  (`key: value  # comment`) are stripped from unquoted scalars.
- **List of str**: `key:` followed by `  - item` lines.
- **Dict of str→str**: `key:` followed by `  k: v` lines.

Rejected (raise `SchemaValidationError`):
- Multiline block scalars (`|`, `>`)
- Flow style (`[a, b]`, `{a: b}`)
- Anchors / aliases (`&x`, `*x`)
- Nested lists or nested dicts beyond one level

Runtime dep: **stdlib only**. No PyYAML, no `uv`, no `pip install`.

## Python Protocol (Phase 2 reference)

```python
class StorageAdapter(Protocol):
    def read(self, slug: str) -> EpicData: ...
    def write(self, slug: str, data: EpicData) -> None: ...
    def list(self) -> list[str]: ...
    def exists(self, slug: str) -> bool: ...
```
